_meta.description: Default seed data for the HealthCheck module. Loaded via Data Management → Load Default Data. Uses ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING so safe to run multiple times.

hc_module_config.description: Health poller configuration — interval, timeout, retry settings, and poller start timestamp.
General module settings — default values for new applications.
Global SLA configuration — single SLA target % applied to all categories marked for SLA calculation. Measured monthly.
Planned downtime source configuration — where to fetch planned maintenance windows.

hc_categories.name: Core System (Uptime Monitoring)
hc_categories.description: Core system applications for uptime monitoring. This is a system default category and cannot be edited or deleted. Only applications in this category are used for uptime monitoring and SLA calculations.

hc_categories.name: Source Interfaces
hc_categories.description: Source interface applications and inbound data feeds.

hc_applications.name: Google Homepage
hc_applications.description: Google homepage for Core System uptime monitoring.

hc_applications.name: GitHub Status API
hc_applications.description: GitHub Status API for Core System uptime monitoring.

hc_applications.name: JSONPlaceholder API
hc_applications.description: JSONPlaceholder fake REST API for Source Interfaces.

hc_applications.name: httpbin Status Check
hc_applications.description: httpbin status endpoint for Source Interfaces.

hc_applications.description: Microsoft Azure status page for Source Interfaces.
